_max_entries_per_day_note: Set to -1 to disable the hard cap and rely on buying power and AI judgment alone.
_entry_price_strategy_note: mid (default): Day limit at streaming mid price; falls back to natural_bid if avg per-leg spread > mid_spread_gate or session is open_volatile/late, or if unfilled after mid_improve_wait_seconds. natural_bid: immediate fill price. ioc_step: IOC attempts above natural bid stepping down. day_improve: Day limit at natural_bid + day_improve_amount. auto: agent chooses per-iteration.
_separate_spread_entry_note: Controls IC order structure. false = always 4-leg combo. true = always separate 2-leg spreads. "auto" = agent evaluates per-iteration: favors separate when IV rank > 0.35, session is late/open_volatile, or 2+ ICs already open; falls back to separate if combo dry_run returns warnings.
_stop_type_note: spread (default): software stop monitors the IC's cost and closes the full spread when the trigger ratio is hit. single: places an exchange stop on the short leg; agent closes the long leg on fill.
_stop_trigger_ratio_note: Fraction of net_credit at which the stop triggers. Default 0.95 = stop fires when spread costs 95% of the original credit received.
_stop_limit_ratio_note: Only used in spread mode. Limit price as a fraction of net_credit for the closing order.
_enable_live_trading_note: Set to true to allow execute_trade/adjust_order/close_position to submit real orders. Requires tastytrade OAuth credentials in the OS keyring (via tastytrade-mcp secrets set).
